programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The contestants of “Surviving Mann” are handpicked for their exceptional skills and determination. Under the guidance of survival expert Don Mann, they face a series of challenges designed to push them beyond their limits. Each contestant must adapt, innovate, and collaborate to survive in an unforgiving environment. As the grueling challenges unfold, they discover new strengths and forge deeper bonds. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with intense tests of endurance, strategy, and resilience, with Don Mann inspiring and pushing them every step of the way.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The CIA has called again, and Don has answered the call on behalf of the A-team. A team of special operatives are needed for a highly classified peace mission that could turn deadly at a moment's notice. To spearhead their mission training efforts, the team hits the range with some state-of-the-art SIRT pistols. Then, the gloves are off and the team gets their first course of fire for the season. After the fun course of fire, the team switches gears to knife throwing and fire building, with the help of Top Knives. It’s safe to say, these All-stars aren’t waiting a second.

programme.title: West of Cimarron 1941
programme.desc: In West of Cimarron, the Rough Riders saddle up for justice! When a ruthless gang threatens to plunge the frontier into lawlessness, Buck Roberts (Buck Jones), Tim McCall (Tim McCoy), and Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton) ride into action. With six-guns blazing and courage unshaken, the trio takes on outlaws, treachery, and danger at every turn in this thrilling chapter of the Rough Riders series.

programme.title: The Trusted Outlaw 1937
programme.desc: In The Trusted Outlaw, cowboy star Bob Steele delivers action and grit as a reformed outlaw trying to walk the straight path. But when a ruthless gang frames him for crimes he didn’t commit, he’s forced back into the saddle to clear his name. With fast-paced gunfights, high-stakes drama, and Steele’s trademark toughness, this Western proves that sometimes it takes an outlaw’s courage to bring true justice to the frontier.

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino

programme.title: Heroes On Call: The Forgotten Story of America's First Paramedics
programme.desc: In the 1960s, Americans were dying at shocking rates due to inadequate emergency care. Enter Freedom House Ambulance Service: the first paramedics unit in the U.S., run and staffed by Black men and women. This is the origin story of EMS.
